data.title: RFK Jr Asks If Public-Funded Healthcare Should Be Accessible To People Smoking 'Three Packs A Day'
data.description: RFK Jr. questions if society should cover healthcare costs for unhealthy habits, sparking debate. Experts worry about limiting access based on behavior.

data.title: Ray Dalio, Who Predicted The 2008 Financial Crisis, Warns About Recession As US-China Tariff War Escalates
data.description: Ray Dalio, who predicted the 2008 crisis, expressed concerns about a potential recession despite Trump's tariff pause.

data.title: Kevin O'Leary Says Xi Jinping Is 'Playing With Fire:' 'If This Gamble Doesn't Pay Off…'
data.description: Kevin O'Leary criticizes Trump's tariff strategy against China, citing potential consequences for markets and his political standing.

data.title: Ex-OpenAI Staffers Support Elon Musk's Legal Battle Against Sam Altman-Led AI Startup's For-Profit Shift
data.description: 12 ex-employees of OpenAI support Elon Musk in his legal battle against the company's transition to for-profit.

data.title: Trump And Xi Jinping's Tariff Threats May Be 'Just For The LOLz,' Says Analyst: 'It's Not Like This Is A Great Financial Crisis'
data.description: Amid escalating U.S.-China tariff threats, BCA Research's Marko Papic says the rhetoric may be largely performative "for the LOLz."
